preFixReproduction.observed: A separate pale two-row action panel opened above a bottom dock that already displayed the same universal actions, producing duplicate navigation, heavy borders and an outdated prototype appearance.

rootCause: The compact launcher was implemented as a second surface while the centre dock remained permanently bound to the universal root-action carousel. The product description called for Mool to transform the dock, but the UI stacked both states.
resolution: The centre dock now shows focused feature actions during normal use, such as Shorts, Videos, Feed and Create for Social.
Tapping Mool replaces that same centre area with a single horizontal universal-action rail; no upper panel or duplicated root rail remains.
The open dock uses a dark navy glass surface, saffron Mool state, one white current-action capsule and 40-pixel-high action targets.
Closing Mool restores the prior focused actions without changing or losing the current screen state.
Guided journey contracts now explicitly test Mool followed by the selected universal action.

guidedWorkSequence: Screen 67 reached at Earn and Create Work Profile 2 / 8

auditReconciliation.initialAggregateIssue: Screen 44 external map route became cross-origin between the guarded settling loop and final verifier URL read.
auditReconciliation.rootCause: Audit observation timing race after a successful external handoff; no product failure.
auditReconciliation.resolution: Accept browser opacity as handoff evidence when the tapped anchor declared a cross-origin destination, including at final observation.
